commit.subject: ATM-1880 tests: run review tests with el7.9
commit.message:
ATM-1880 tests: run review tests with el7.9

Patch to run all reveiw test groups with el7.9
server and clients to make sure this combination
passes.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
